title: Notion Workspace Structure Examples Swipe File for Team Leads
description: Team leads use this swipe file of 25 real Notion workspace architectures — organized by team size and function — to make confident structural decisions instead of starting from a blank sidebar.
gumroad_description:
You're staring at a blank Notion sidebar wondering what a well-structured workspace actually looks like for your team size.

This swipe file gives you 25 real workspace architectures—organized by team size and function—so you can stop guessing and start building with confidence.

Who this is for
— Team leads managing 3-15 people who need a foundation that scales without chaos
— Ops or admin folks who own the Notion setup and want best practices, not trial-and-error
— Managers hiring fast who need a structure ready before your first new hire joins

What's inside
— 12 copy-ready examples (SaaS teams, agencies, service businesses, remote-first ops)
— Complete architecture breakdown: database structure, relation logic, view setup, and automation hooks
— Markdown files for quick reference + JSON exports you can actually paste into your workspace
— Usage notes explaining why each choice matters for your specific team context

Stop redesigning your Notion from scratch every quarter. Download and use it today.

Discover more tools like this at mini-on-ai.com
